value: Supports value refs (dollar-brace syntax), exec refs (dollar-paren syntax), fallback defaults (:-), and required checks (:?). Backslash-escape emits literals (backslash consumed on output). Recursive with circular-ref detection. --source flag skips interpolation on get; --plain only strips colors. (--raw was a deprecated alias for --plain since v1.9.1; removed entirely in v1.11.)
